title: Android Workout Log App
description: Android application for creating, managing, and logging workout sessions with a focus on fast, structured input during training.
The app supports both workout planning and real-time session tracking, allowing users to build custom exercise sets and record performance during ongoing workouts.
The design emphasizes flexibility and extensibility, enabling support for multiple training types such as strength training, running, cycling, and swimming through a unified workout structure.
The project was developed as part of a university assignment, focusing on UI/UX design and mobile application development principles.
